scripts.build:desktop-web: vite build --mode desktop && node scripts/stage-desktop-assets.mjs && node scripts/verify-desktop-assets.mjs && node scripts/build-windows-thumbnail-provider.mjs
scripts.build:vscode-web: vite build --mode vscode && node scripts/stage-vscode-assets.mjs && node scripts/verify-vscode-assets.mjs
scripts.lint: eslint src tests e2e playwright.config.ts vite.config.ts vitest.config.ts --max-warnings=0
scripts.vscode:test: npm run build:vscode-web && npm --prefix vscode-extension test
scripts.vscode:package: npm run build:vscode-web && npm --prefix vscode-extension run package
scripts.desktop:check: node scripts/build-windows-thumbnail-provider.mjs --locked && cd src-tauri && cargo fmt --check && cargo check --locked && cargo test --locked && cargo fmt --manifest-path thumbnail-provider/Cargo.toml --check && cargo test --manifest-path thumbnail-provider/Cargo.toml --locked
